subtitles.original: 頭を垂れないで！
subtitles.english: Don't hang your head!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: みんな、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you, everyone!

subtitles.original: はぁ、やばい、ちょっと息切れた。
subtitles.english: Whew, oh my, I'm a bit out of breath.

subtitles.original: お水飲ませてくださいね、すみませんね。
subtitles.english: Please let me drink some water, sorry about that.

subtitles.original: うーーん...
subtitles.english: Mmm...

subtitles.original: はぁ、うまい！
subtitles.english: Ah, so good!

subtitles.original: すみません、ありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Sorry, thank you very much!

subtitles.original: お待たせしてすみませんね。
subtitles.english: Sorry to keep you waiting.

subtitles.original: えっと、先ほどは...
subtitles.english: Um, earlier, I performed...

subtitles.original: 『ジェンルード』と『罪と罰』と...
subtitles.english: ...'Genrude' and 'Crime and Punishment', and...

subtitles.original: 『阿修羅ちゃん』をお届けしました！
subtitles.english: ...'Ashura-chan'!

subtitles.original: どうでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: How was it?

subtitles.original: この後も、まだまだライブは続きます！
subtitles.english: The live concert will still continue after this!

subtitles.original: まだ披露してない...
subtitles.english: Songs I haven't performed yet...

subtitles.original: あんな曲や...
subtitles.english: ...like that song...

subtitles.original: こんな曲があるかもね！
subtitles.english: ...and this song might be coming up!

subtitles.original: なので、チャンネルはそのままで、まだ見ててくれたら嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: So please keep the channel right here and stay tuned!

subtitles.original: ここでみんなにお知らせをさせてください！
subtitles.english: Now, please let me share some announcements with you!

subtitles.original: こちらです！
subtitles.english: Here they are!

subtitles.original: 沙咲リオナ誕生日記念...
subtitles.english: Isaki Riona's Birthday Celebration...

subtitles.original: 2026のグッズが出ます！やったー！
subtitles.english: ...2026 merchandise is coming out! Yay!

subtitles.original: では、詳細を...
subtitles.english: Now, let's...

subtitles.original: 見ていきましょう！
subtitles.english: ...take a closer look!

subtitles.original: まずはこちらです！
subtitles.english: First is this one!

subtitles.original: 『RIONA ON THE STAGE』タペストリー！
subtitles.english: The 'RIONA ON THE STAGE' Tapestry!

subtitles.original: イラストは今回、みんちゅ先生にお願いさせていただきました！
subtitles.english: The illustration was drawn by Minchu-sensei!

subtitles.original: ライブ中のリオナをテーマに描かれたイラストで、
subtitles.english: The illustration depicts Riona performing live,

subtitles.original: とっても可愛いイラストになっているので、タペストリーでぜひ堪能してください！
subtitles.english: and it turned out incredibly cute! Please enjoy it on this tapestry!

subtitles.original: 2つ目は、こちら！
subtitles.english: Second is this one!

subtitles.original: リオナとおそろいネックレス！
subtitles.english: A matching necklace with Riona!

subtitles.original: 真ん中には、王冠のデザイン、
subtitles.english: The center features a crown design,

subtitles.original: 周りには沙咲リオナのロゴが入っていますので、
subtitles.english: and it's surrounded by Isaki Riona's logo.

subtitles.original: あの、シンプルになってますのでね、ぜひリオナとおそろいにしてください！
subtitles.english: It has a simple design, so I'd be happy if you matched with me!

subtitles.original: 次は、こちら！
subtitles.english: Next up is this!

subtitles.original: リオナのぬいを入れるポーチ！
subtitles.english: A pouch to carry Riona's plushie!

subtitles.original: リオナっぽさ全開のぬいポーチになってます！
subtitles.english: It's a plushie pouch packed with Riona's style!

subtitles.original: ぜひ、リオナのぬいを入れてくれたら嬉しいなと思います！
subtitles.english: I'd love for you to put my plushie inside!

subtitles.original: ぬい以外に使っても大丈夫だよ、ポーチになるよ！
subtitles.english: You can also use it for other things, it works as a regular pouch!

subtitles.original: そして、そして、最後は、こちら！
subtitles.english: And finally, this one!

subtitles.original: くしゃみ連発ぬいキーホルダー！
subtitles.english: The 'sneeze-spammer' plushie keychain!

subtitles.original: 今回、描き下ろしイラストの衣装のぬいぐるみキーホルダーになってます！
subtitles.english: This is a plushie keychain wearing the newly drawn illustration's outfit!

subtitles.original: なんとね、この手の部分をポチッと押すと...
subtitles.english: And if you press its hand...

subtitles.original: 「はっくしゅん！」って言うので、いっぱい押していっぱい浴びてください！
subtitles.english: it says 'Achoo!', so please press it a lot to hear my sneezes!

subtitles.original: そしたら改めて、フルセットの方を全部見ていきましょう、こちら！
subtitles.english: Now, let's take a look at the entire full set together! Here!

subtitles.original: 盛りだくさん！
subtitles.english: So many items!

subtitles.original: もちろん、フルセット購入特典もあります！こちら！
subtitles.english: Of course, there are also full-set purchase bonuses! Here!

subtitles.original: フルセット購入特典の1つ目は...
subtitles.english: The first bonus for buying the full set is...

subtitles.original: 直筆サインと箔押しメッセージ入りのバックステージパス風カードです！
subtitles.english: a backstage pass-style card with a hand-written autograph and a foil-stamped message!

subtitles.original: こちらもみんちゅ先生のイラストに、全て私がね...
subtitles.english: This also features Minchu-sensei's illustration, and I will personally...

subtitles.original: 1つずつサインさせていただくので、よかったらぜひ買ってみてください！
subtitles.english: sign each and every one! So please consider buying it!

subtitles.original: 2つ目は、特典ボイス！
subtitles.english: The second bonus is a special voice clip!

subtitles.original: 『ライブ前に君と』です！
subtitles.english: It's titled 'With you before the live concert'!

subtitles.original: ライブ前にこう緊張して、「へへへ」ってなってるリオナを励ますシチュエーションです！
subtitles.english: It's a scenario where you encourage Riona when she's super nervous before going on stage!

subtitles.original: ぜひ、ボイスの方も聞いてくれると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I hope you listen to the voice clip too!

subtitles.original: こちらのグッズは、21時、9時からカートオープンです！
subtitles.english: These goods will be available starting at 9:00 PM (21:00)!

subtitles.original: みんなよかったら、ぜひゲットしてください！
subtitles.english: I hope you all get them!

subtitles.original: そして、大事なお知らせが、2つ目、あります！
subtitles.english: And I have a second important announcement!

subtitles.original: 聞いてください！
subtitles.english: Please listen!

subtitles.original: ドゥルルルルルル、ジャン！
subtitles.english: *Drumroll*... Tada!

subtitles.original: 沙咲リオナの、初！ソロの新曲が出ます！やったー！
subtitles.english: Isaki Riona's very first original solo song is coming out! Yay!

subtitles.original: タイトルは『Ring my name』です！
subtitles.english: The title is 'Ring my name'!

subtitles.original: こちら、私の思いだったり、これから先...
subtitles.english: This song reflects my feelings, and how I want to...

subtitles.original: どうやってこう進んでいくか、「私は進んでいくぞ」というのが...
subtitles.english: ...move forward in the future, conveying 'I will march on!'

subtitles.original: おしゃれで、優雅に、エレガントに表現された曲となっております！
subtitles.english: It's expressed in a stylish, graceful, and elegant way!

subtitles.original: こちらセクシーな振り付けもついているので、ぜひ注目してください！
subtitles.english: It also features sexy choreography, so I'd be happy if you paid attention to that as well!

subtitles.original: この後、このライブが終わった後すぐに、MVも公開されますし、
subtitles.english: The music video will be released right after this concert ends,

subtitles.original: この後24時からデジタルリリースもあるので、ぜひいっぱい聴いてください！
subtitles.english: and it will be digitally released at midnight! Please listen to it a lot!

subtitles.original: やっぱりこの後は、新曲やっちゃいますよね！
subtitles.english: Of course, I have to perform the new song next!

subtitles.original: ということでやっていくんですけど、その前にちょっと語らせてください！
subtitles.english: So yes, I'll be performing it, but before that, let me say a few words!

subtitles.original: まあね、リオナは、まだまだなことがいっぱいあって、叶えたい夢もいっぱいあります！
subtitles.english: You see, there are still so many things I've yet to achieve, and so many dreams I want to fulfill!

subtitles.original: 何も手にしてない私かもしれませんが、付いてきてくれたあなたと、夢や思い出を作っていきたいです！
subtitles.english: I might still be someone who hasn't accomplished much yet, but I want to build dreams and memories with you!

subtitles.original: 絶対に後悔はさせないんで、これからも付いてきてくれると嬉しいです！よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: I promise I won't make you regret it, so I'd be happy if you keep supporting me! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: そしてこの後は、新曲の披露の前に、先輩方のオリ曲を使ったダンスメドレーをお届けします！
subtitles.english: And next, before performing the new song, I'll bring you a dance medley featuring original songs by my seniors!

subtitles.original: こちら、たくさんのジャンルのダンスを踊る...
subtitles.english: In this medley, I'll be dancing to many different genres...

responses.thoughts:
**My Analysis of the Task**

Okay, here's the deal: I need to whip up some audio-synchronized subtitles, in both Japanese and English, for this video. The user's given me a video file and a reference JSON file with lyrics. The real challenge here is figuring out the exact timings, because it's crucial for the subtitles to be perfectly in sync with the audio.

First, I need to understand the video content. I've broken down the video: Isaki Riona starts with a performance (Ashura-chan's last lyrics), and then there is a talking segment. I have to confirm the lyrics in the JSON file match the segment of interest. The JSON says the "Ring my name" song lyrics begin at 03:43.000, so I need to verify what the actual contents of the video are, as this is the primary goal of the request. The video length is approximately 4 minutes and 56 seconds.

I've carefully watched the video and made notes to pin down the precise start and end times for each spoken phrase. This includes her opening, the instrumental section (zero ghost subtitles required here), her "Thank you" messages, some brief "breathing" moments, and also the introductions of songs, merchandise announcements, and the new song announcements.

I've been going through the video, frame by frame, to note every timestamp. I've re-checked the initial timestamps, specifically the scream in the beginning and any phrases to ensure I have the exact milliseconds. There were a couple of clarifications required for the merchandise announcements.

Once I have the timestamps sorted out, I'm making sure each line is around 50 characters or less. I'm also ensuring the translations make perfect sense and sound natural. I've re-checked that the translations are fluent and make sense. I also have to ensure that there are no gaps or overlap.

I'm ready to craft the subtitles now. I've made the JSON format with each Japanese phrase, the timestamp, and the English translation. Then I reviewed the JSON to ensure it is perfect. This is the last step.
